query:
UPDATE games SET publishedModel=1 WHERE sport='NHL' AND gameDate='2026-03-19' AND modelTotal IS NOT NULL;
SELECT awayTeam, homeTeam, awayModelSpread, modelTotal, modelAwayPLOdds, modelHomePLOdds, modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds, modelAwayML, modelHomeML, publishedModel FROM games WHERE sport='NHL' AND gameDate='2026-03-19' ORDER BY sortOrder;
